seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Build or host any cloud app/API/service via single prompt chat; spin up local LLMs; run always-on agents (Hermes/Claw); integrate cloud storage/databases, Claude/Codex; scale to billions of agents.
Multi-agent swarms with models like Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.5, GPT 5.5 for coding/testing/research/monitoring; master agent orchestrates workers via English instructions for complex SaaS/automations.
Provides sandbox, LLM gateway/model router, and observability for agent platforms; verifiers for scaling evals/RL with cost optimizations.
